center.name: 貝拉瓜斯省
center.summary: 貝拉瓜斯省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联9种鸟类，包括厚嘴拟啄木鸟、Sulphur-winged parakeet、Ruddy treerunner等9种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The buffy tuftedcheek is found from the central part of Costa Rica's Central Highlands south into western Panama as far as Veraguas Province. It inhabits humid montane evergreen forest, where it favors somewhat open tracts, the edges of denser tracts, and clearings with scattered trees

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The female is duller with blackish underparts. It is found in northern and western Colombia (south to Chocó where it is uncommon), the Maracaibo Basin in Venezuela, and over most of Panama, where it extends to Chiriquí and Veraguas Provinces in the west of the country, as well as Coiba, where it is abundant, and Pearl Islands. It inhabits forest, scrub and gardens. A nest with a clutch of two blue eggs with fine dark dots has been recorded. A field study on blood parasites found that two individual crimson-backed tanagers (out of twelve tested) bore Plasmodium, with the study concluding the overall rate was low compared with studies done elsewhere

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: vincens: mountains from the Cordillera de Tilarán in central Costa Rica into Panama to Veraguas Province The elegant euphonia inhabits a variety of landscapes including pine-oak, evergreen, and secondary forest in the upper tropical and subtropical zones. In all areas it favors trees with mistletoe (Loranthaceae). In elevation it mostly ranges from but regularly occurs down to in Mexico. In northern Central America it ranges from and in Costa Rica from

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The golden-browed chlorophonia is found along the mountain ranges for the length of Costa Rica and into western Panama's Chiriquí and Veruagas provinces. It primarily inhabits the interior and edges of evergreen forest in the upper tropical and subtropical zones. It favors trees heavy with moss and epiphytes. Overall it ranges in elevation from but in Costa Rica is found from to treeline

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: boultoni is found in eastern Chiriquí and Veraguas Provinces

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies of the slaty-winged foliage-gleaner is found in central Panama from Veraguas Province to the Canal Zone

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The streak-breasted treehunter is found in the Talamancan montane forests through most of Costa Rica and into Panama as far as Veraguas Province

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: gaudens is found in western Panama as far east as Veraguas Province. The species inhabits primary and logged montane forest and adjacent shrubby areas and secondary forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The prong-billed barbet is found in the mountains from Costa Rica's Cordillera de Tilarán to western Panama's Veraguas Province
